SEARCH

Uses of Package
edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services

Packages that use edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services
Package
Description
edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.config
 
edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services
 
  • Classes in edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services used by edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.config
    Class
    Description
    JobContextFactory
    Creates JobContext instances; exists as a seam so tests can substitute contexts.
    JobRateLimit
    Configurable delay for rate limiting calls to external APIs from inside jobs.
    JobService
    Creates Job rows and runs JobContextConsumers asynchronously on the jobsExecutor, recording status and log output as they run.
  • Classes in edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services used by edu.ucsb.cs156.jobs.services
    Class
    Description
    JobContext
    Handed to a running JobContextConsumer; each JobContext.log(java.lang.String) call appends a line to the job's persistent log and saves it, so admins can watch progress live.
    JobContextConsumer
    A concrete job: the code that runs asynchronously, receiving a JobContext for logging.
